texts.desc: Target 1 monster you control and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy your monster, and if you do, negate the effects of that opponent's card until the end of this turn. If this Set card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; negate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Cursed Paper Retribution" once per turn.
texts.name: Cursed Paper Retribution
